n. the diseased beggar in Jesus' parable of the rich man and the beggar

laze.t:
vi. 偷懒, 混日子
vt. 消磨
n. 懒散
laze.d: v be idle; exist in a changeless situation

lazed.t: v. 混日子( laze的过去式和过去分词 ); 懒散; 闲散; 闲散地打发时间

lazers.t: (lazer 的复数) n. (Lazer)人名；(法)拉泽

lazes.t: v. 混日子( laze的第三人称单数 ); 懒散; 闲散; 闲散地打发时间
lazes.d: v be idle; exist in a changeless situation

lazier.t: a. 无精打采的( lazy的比较级 ); 不愿工作的; 行进缓慢的; 没下工夫的
lazier.d:
s. moving slowly and gently
s. disinclined to work or exertion

laziest.t: a. 无精打采的( lazy的最高级 ); 不愿工作的; 行进缓慢的; 没下工夫的
laziest.d:
s. moving slowly and gently
s. disinclined to work or exertion

lazily.d: r. in a slow and lazy manner

laziness.t: n. 怠惰, 无精打采

lazing.t: v. 混日子( laze的现在分词 ); 懒散; 闲散; 闲散地打发时间
lazing.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Laze

lazio.t: 拉齐奥区[意大利行政区名]
lazio.d: n an ancient region of west central Italy (southeast of Rome) on the Tyrrhenian Sea

lazo.t: [地名] [俄罗斯] 拉佐; [地名] [阿根廷] 拉索

lazuli.t: n. (=lapis lazuli)天青石, 青金石
lazuli.d: n an azure blue semiprecious stone

lazuline.t: a. 青金石蓝的,天青石蓝的
lazuline.d: n a light shade of blue

lazulite.d:
n. A mineral of a light indigo-blue color, occurring in
   small masses, or in monoclinic crystals; blue spar. It is a hydrous
   phosphate of alumina and magnesia.

lazy.t:
a. 懒惰的, 怠惰的, 缓慢的
vi. 懒散

lazy board.t: [化] 木制支架(架设管道用)

lazy evaluation.t: [计] 延迟求值, 迟缓计算, 惰性求值

lazy susan.t: （餐桌上盛食物便于取食的）圆转盘

lazy-beds.t: (lazy-bed 的复数) n. 马铃薯

lazyback.d:
n. A support for the back, attached to the seat of a
   carriage.

lazybeds.t: (lazybed 的第三人称 -s形式) n.<主英>马铃薯

lazyish.t: a. 有点儿怠惰的, 懒洋洋的

lazyjacks.t: (lazyjack 的复数)  屈伸起重机

lazzaro spallanzani.t: [网络] 帕朗札尼；帕拉扎尼；斯帕兰让尼

lazzaroni.d:
n. pl. The homeless idlers of Naples who live by chance
   work or begging; -- so called from the Hospital of St. Lazarus, which
   serves as their refuge.
